description: A geophysicist interprets data from an airborne magnetic survey to identify geological structures that might host mineralization.

nodes.task_description: Import and process the raw magnetic data from the airborne survey.

expected_outcome.expected: A clean, processed magnetic map of the survey area is created.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the magnetic map to identify linear features that could represent faults or dykes.

expected_outcome.expected: Major structural features are interpreted from the data.

nodes.task_description: Integrate the interpretation with the known geology to generate new exploration targets where favorable structures intersect prospective rock types.

expected_outcome.expected: A set of new exploration targets is generated and prioritized for follow-up.
